description_long: This is a cylindrical bottle with a long neck and a slightly tapered mouth, featuring a textured surface with a pattern resembling fish scales or herringbone. The bottle appears to be made of a cloudy, off-white or light gray material, possibly glass or ceramic, with a matte finish. The body is elongated and uniform in diameter, while the neck is narrower and smoothly transitions to the mouth. There are no visible labels, logos, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The surface shows some subtle discoloration and irregularities, suggesting age or weathering. The bottle is hollow and designed to hold liquids, with no visible cap or closure mechanism.
description: A textured, elongated bottle with a narrow neck and matte, cloudy surface, showing signs of age or weathering. The bottle is off-white or light gray and lacks any visible branding or cap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow mouth and neck, with the textured cylindrical body receding into the background.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the bottle, highlighting the herringbone texture and the smooth transition from body to neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat base and the bottle's overall cylindrical shape, with the texture pattern visible along the length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the bottle's length, texture, and the gentle taper of the neck.
